query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.subtotal, o.stateGst, o.centralGst, o.totalAmount, o.paymentMethod, o.orderStatus,
       oi.id as itemId, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice, oi.lineTotal, oi.status
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.orderNumber = '00887';

       oi.id as itemId, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice, oi.lineTotal, oi.status
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.orderId = o.id
